summary: All 6 changes MET: epoch interruption wired, Cedar reads from DB, BGW exercises Cedar via publisher_did, Fulcio cert chain validated (x509-cert), DID HTTP resolver with TTL cache, integration test harness compiles for all 3 stores. No external blockers. Key debt: AllowAllPolicySource still present (LOW), epoch ticker not bound to EdgeRuntime lifetime (LOW). Recommended next: p8-sdk-completeness (React/Flutter SDK hardening, HTMX remaining components, CI pipeline).
